message.content: Watching videos of real street fights can be considered morally problematic. While some might view it as harmless entertainment, it can fuel a culture that glamorizes violence and aggression. Such content can potentially influence individuals to adopt more aggressive behaviors or attitudes, which can be harmful both to society and to the individuals who consume this type of content. It is important to consider the potential negative impacts, especially on impressionable viewers and to seek out forms of entertainment that promote positive values and healthy behaviors.
